extra_model_fields.primary_goal: Improve semantic completeness and automated verifiability while preserving existing computed outputs.
regression_mitigation: Run validate_scores.py to ensure recomputed scores exactly match CSV; include checks for rounding invariance.

Limit code changes to documentation, additional columns, and small validation script; avoid changing the declared scoring formula or normalization approach unless mapping resolution explicitly requires it.

extra_model_fields.primary_goal: Improve semantic completeness and automated verifiability while preserving existing computed outputs.
regression_mitigation: Run validate_scores.py to ensure recomputed scores exactly match CSV; include checks for rounding invariance.

Limit code changes to documentation, additional columns, and small validation script; avoid changing the declared scoring formula or normalization approach unless mapping resolution explicitly requires it.

acceptance_criteria: superintendent_brief.md includes a 'Numeric Rounding Policy' section stating decimals used and rounding method (half-up or banker's).
progress_deviation.csv contains rounded intermediate columns and a 'rounding_sensitive' boolean per row.
No unmarked classification flips remain; any flips are flagged in CSV and brief.
planned_changes.description: Add an explicit numeric rounding policy to the brief and CSV. Implement rounding at defined stages (intermediate_norms -> 4 decimals; final score -> 2 decimals) and add 'rounded_*' columns in progress_deviation.csv. Append a small table proving classification invariance under declared rounding, or mark rows that flip with 'rounding_sensitive=true'.

acceptance_criteria: superintendent_brief.md contains either a cited mapping source or a 'Mapping Alternatives and Impact' subsection with recomputed scores and a clear recommendation for the chosen mapping.
progress_deviation.csv or an attached mapping_variants.csv includes scores for the alternative mappings where applicable.
planned_changes.description: Resolve or fully document the mapping ambiguity between four supplied raw fields and the three scoring drivers. Either cite the canonical mapping or enumerate plausible mappings with a short decision-tree and recompute scores under each mapping. Keep needs_review flag only if unavoidable and provide explicit alternative outcomes.

acceptance_criteria: superintendent_brief.md preview shows full rows for R1-R4 with no truncation.
File size and a brief preview in the precheck show the complete table.
planned_changes.description: Fix truncation: ensure the superintendent brief includes the complete review-ready row table (complete R4 and any trailing notes). Re-generate the brief if necessary to embed the full CSV-derived table.

acceptance_criteria: Brief includes explicit formula for O3 application and any caps.
progress_deviation.csv includes 'post_mitigation_O3_score' columns demonstrating the applied change.
planned_changes.description: Document the arithmetic used to apply option O3 (overbill margin improvement), state any caps (e.g., normalized margin cannot exceed 100), and show post-mitigation score recomputation in the CSV.

acceptance_criteria: sensitivity_test_summary.csv present in artifacts and referenced in superintendent_brief.md.
Verifier can parse the CSV and confirm sensitivity flags for R1-R4 match brief assertions.
planned_changes.description: Create sensitivity_test_summary.csv (machine-readable) with base_score, favorable_shift_score, adverse_shift_score, rounded_base_score, classification_change_flag, and link it in the brief.

acceptance_criteria: scripts/validate_scores.py included in attempt workspace and referenced in brief.
deterministic_precheck.json produced and added to metadata_json in actual_outputs.
Verifier run reproduces the same scores for all rows.
planned_changes.description: Add a small validation script (e.g., scripts/validate_scores.py) that re-computes scores from the raw CSV inputs and writes a deterministic_precheck JSON artifact with equality assertions. Reference or include the precheck result in the brief.

acceptance_criteria: All numeric cells use consistent formatting and units documented in brief.
No formatting inconsistencies are flagged in the verifier preview.
planned_changes.description: Ensure consistent numeric formatting (thousands separators, decimals), fix any minor text issues, and re-run the deterministic precheck/verifier.

raw_model_output.revision_reason: Address minor completeness and machine-readability concerns: explicit rounding policy, metric-mapping documentation (or alternatives), complete superintendent brief (no truncation), clarified O3 interpretation/cap, and add a separate sensitivity_test_summary CSV and validation script to improve verifier consumption.

metadata_json.revision_goal: Baseline attempt produced the required artifacts and applied a clear deterministic normalization and scoring formula; per-row traceability, sensitivity testing, remediation cost arithmetic, and expert-review flags are present. Minor completeness issues reduce semantic polish: (1) no explicit numeric rounding/precision policy or demonstration that rounding will not flip classifications; (2) unresolved ambiguity mapping four supplied raw fields to three scoring drivers (correctly flagged as needs_review but requires a short decision-tree or authoritative citation); (3) the superintendent brief preview is truncated (R4 row cut) so ensure the delivered brief is complete; (4) clarify interpretation and cap for O3 margin improvement and provide a separate machine-readable sensitivity summary CSV for automated verifiers.
